description_long: This is a classic banker’s lamp featuring a smooth, curved green glass shade supported by a brass-colored metal frame. The lamp stands on a round, dark wooden base with visible wood grain texture, providing stability and a touch of elegance. A pull-chain switch, also brass-colored, hangs from beneath the shade, adding both functionality and vintage charm. The lamp’s frame is slender and symmetrical, with rounded joints and a horizontal bar supporting the shade. The green glass shade is opaque and gently domed, diffusing light softly downward. This lamp is typically found on desks in libraries, offices, or study areas, blending traditional aesthetics with practical lighting.
description: A classic banker’s lamp with a green glass shade, brass frame, and round wooden base, featuring a pull-chain switch. The design is elegant and vintage, ideal for desks or study areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full green glass shade, brass frame, and round wooden base, with the pull-chain switch visible on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved profile of the green shade, the slender brass support, and the pull-chain hanging down.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the green shade, the symmetrical brass frame, and the wooden base, with the pull-chain on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curved green shade, brass support, and the pull-chain, with the wooden base clearly visible.
